mapper.insert: insert into hybridanalysis.ast_error (name, user_id, source_folder_id, create_time, update_time, output_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{outputId}, #{path});
insert into hybridanalysis.ast_output(name, create_time, update_time, user_id, source_folder_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{userId}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{path})
